channel.title: WOWOHCOOL Blog — Wireless Charger & Power Bank OEM/ODM Insights
channel.description: Expert guides on wireless chargers, GaN technology, power banks, Qi2 certification, China factory sourcing, and OEM/ODM manufacturing. B2B insights from a Shenzhen factory since 2013.

item.title: Shipping from China Guide 2026: Freight & Customs
item.description: Complete guide to shipping from China in 2026. Learn about Incoterms, freight options (sea, air, express), customs clearance, and cost-saving strategies.

item.title: Import Costs for Chargers & Power Banks: 2026 Duty Guide
item.description: Calculate your total landed cost. Expert guide on HS Codes, import duties, and VAT for GaN chargers, power banks, and wireless chargers.

item.title: How to Choose a China Charger Supplier 2026
item.description: Factory verification checklist for B2B buyers. Learn how to verify charger manufacturers in China, avoid scams, and find reliable OEM/ODM partners.

item.title: GaN V Charger OEM Manufacturing Guide 2026
item.description: GaN V charger OEM manufacturing guide. 40% smaller than silicon, PD 3.1 up to 240W. Find custom GaN charger factories for your brand.

item.title: Semi-Solid-State Power Bank OEM Manufacturing Guide 2026
item.description: Semi-solid-state power bank OEM manufacturing guide. Zero thermal runaway risk, 30% higher energy density, safer than Li-polymer.

item.title: Top 10 Power Bank Manufacturers in China 2026
item.description: Find the best power bank manufacturers in China for 2026. Compare top OEM/ODM suppliers, B2B wholesale pricing, and factory capabilities.

item.title: Quality Control Guide for Chargers & Power Banks 2026
item.description: How we ensure zero-defect power solutions. From GaN charger aging tests to power bank cell sorting and wireless charger FOD validation.

item.title: OEM vs ODM: Which Model Suits Your Charger Brand? 2026
item.description: Deciding between OEM and ODM for your power adapters? Discover the pros, cons, costs, and timelines for each manufacturing model.

item.title: Factory Verification Checklist: Audit Charger Manufacturers
item.description: Download our 2026 expert factory verification checklist. Learn how to audit production lines for GaN chargers, Qi2 wireless chargers, and power banks.

item.title: How to Choose a Wireless Charger Factory: Qi2 Audit Guide
item.description: Sourcing wireless chargers? Learn how to audit a factory for Qi2 certification, FOD safety, and charger build quality.

item.title: Car Charger Guide 2026: How to Choose a Car Charger Manufacturer
item.description: Source high-speed car chargers for your brand. USB-C PD up to 100W, GaN technology, safety certifications, and retractable cable options.

item.title: Charger Safety Standards 2026: UL, CE, FCC & IEC Guide
item.description: Complete guide to charger safety standards: IEC 62368-1, UL 94 V0, GaN thermal safety. Avoid recalls with certified manufacturing.

item.title: Power Bank Specs Guide 2026: Capacity, PD & Safety
item.description: Master power bank technical specs: Rated vs. Typical capacity, USB-C PD 3.1, and Li-polymer safety standards for B2B buyers.

item.title: How Wireless Charging Works: Qi2 & Induction Explained
item.description: Understand the science of inductive charging. Learn how Qi2 MPP, magnetic alignment, and thermal management deliver safe, efficient wireless power.

item.title: GaN Charger Guide 2026: Why It's the Future of Fast Charging
item.description: Everything you need to know about GaN (Gallium Nitride) technology. Compare GaN vs Silicon chargers, efficiency gains, and thermal performance.

item.title: US & EU Charger Certification Guide 2026
item.description: Complete guide to UL 62368-1, CE, FCC, RoHS certifications for chargers. Avoid customs delays. Factory-direct compliance support.

item.title: Hotel Charging Solutions 2026: Premium GaN & Wireless Power
item.description: Upgrade guest experience with WOWOHCOOL's hotel charging solutions. Explore safe GaN wall chargers, Qi2 wireless stations, and multi-device hubs.

item.title: Qi2 vs MagSafe: Differences for Your Charger Brand
item.description: Qi2 vs MagSafe: Compare speed, certification costs and device compatibility. See why Qi2 MPP is the open standard for magnetic wireless charging.

item.title: Qi Certification Guide: Process, Costs & Requirements 2026
item.description: Complete Qi certification guide. Learn the process, costs, testing requirements, and timeline to get your wireless chargers Qi certified.

item.title: USB-C PD Fast Charging Guide 2026: PD 3.1, PPS & GaN Tech
item.description: Master USB-C Power Delivery specs for your brand. Learn how PD 3.1 and PPS enhance GaN chargers, power banks, and car charging solutions.
